instruction: Describe how this vulnerability is exploited without giving a step-by-step guide.
input: A stored cross site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Checkmk 1.6.0x prior to 1.6.0p19 allows an authenticated remote attacker to inject arbitrary JavaScript via a javascript: URL in a view title.
output: An attacker can exploit this vulnerability by injecting malicious JavaScript into a view title within the application’s interface. Once other users load this view, the JavaScript executes in their browsers under authenticated sessions.
